measurements.claim: The QEC fixture emits QEC_STABILIZER_FIXTURE_MATCH, corrects no-error and single Pauli-X errors for both logical basis states, and rejects or marks unverifiable the configured negative controls.

The quantum source ledger stores arXiv metadata and digest receipts as source leads rather than promoted hardware, decoder, surface-code, resource-estimation, quantum-advantage, or fault-tolerant computation claims.

The publication copy labels the preflight as a local deterministic fixture and blocks surface-code, hardware QEC, fault-tolerant computation, quantum advantage, cryptographic, and BuildLang/buildc-native runtime claims for this pass.
